mapper.select: SELECT * FROM messages ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM messages WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM messages WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'unread' ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'unread'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages (user_id, content, type, status, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{type}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE messages SET user_id = #{userId}, content = #{content}, type = #{type}, status = #{status}, create_time = #{createTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE messages SET status = 'read' WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE messages SET status = 'read' WHERE user_id = #{userId}
